metrics.expression: SUM(SEARCH('{ClaudeCode,model,type} MetricName="claude_code.token.usage" model="claude-opus-4-6" type="input"', 'Sum', 300)) / 1000000 * 5 + SUM(SEARCH('{ClaudeCode,model,type} MetricName="claude_code.token.usage" model="claude-opus-4-6" type="output"', 'Sum', 300)) / 1000000 * 25 + SUM(SEARCH('{ClaudeCode,model,type} MetricName="claude_code.token.usage" model="claude-opus-4-6" type="cacheRead"', 'Sum', 300)) / 1000000 * 0.5 + SUM(SEARCH('{ClaudeCode,model,type} MetricName="claude_code.token.usage" model="claude-opus-4-6" type="cacheCreation"', 'Sum', 300)) / 1000000 * 6.25

properties.title: Estimated Bedrock Cost Over Time by Model
Estimated Bedrock Cost by User Over Time
Claude Code Cost Over Time by Model (Anthropic Rates)

properties.markdown:
**Tip:** If the dashboard appears empty, check your timezone setting (top-right) — switch to **UTC** if your local timezone doesn't match the data range.

## Bedrock Pricing Reference (per 1M tokens)

| Model | Input | Output | Cache Read (0.1x) | Cache Write (1.25x) |
|-------|------:|-------:|------------------:|--------------------:|
| **Opus 4.6** | $5.00 | $25.00 | $0.50 | $6.25 |
| **Opus 4** | $15.00 | $75.00 | $1.50 | $18.75 |
| **Sonnet 4.6** | $3.00 | $15.00 | $0.30 | $3.75 |
| **Sonnet 4** | $3.00 | $15.00 | $0.30 | $3.75 |
| **Haiku 4.5** | $1.00 | $5.00 | $0.10 | $1.25 |

The **Estimated Bedrock Cost** and **Bedrock Cost by User** panels use `claude_code.cost.usage` which is computed from token counts at Anthropic API rates. For current models in US regions, Anthropic and Bedrock per-token rates are identical. **For non-US Bedrock regions, actual cost is approximately 10% higher** (multiply by 1.1).

The aggregate **Estimated Bedrock Cost** (top row) cross-checks this by computing `claude_code.token.usage` x Bedrock rates directly. Both methods should agree for US regions.
